description_long: This is a bolt-action rifle with a distinctive blue and black camouflage pattern across its stock and body, giving it a modern, tactical appearance. The rifle features a long, slender barrel and a fixed wooden or synthetic stock, both adorned with the same camo finish. A set of iron sights is mounted along the top, and the bolt handle is visible on the right side, indicating manual cycling of the action. Below the receiver, a small internal magazine is present, with a clip of rifle cartridges displayed nearby, suggesting it is loaded via stripper clips. The overall construction appears robust, with metallic components for the barrel and receiver, and a textured stock for improved grip. The rifle's design is reminiscent of classic military surplus rifles, suitable for urban or field deployment.
description: A bolt-action rifle with a blue and black camouflage stock, long barrel, iron sights, and an internal magazine, accompanied by a clip of cartridges. The design is robust and tactical, with a textured finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, blue-black camo stock, iron sights, bolt handle, and a clip of cartridges below.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the slim profile of the barrel and stock, with the bolt handle and iron sights visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the camo pattern, iron sights, and the clip of cartridges, with the bolt handle less visible.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the underside of the rifle, showing the trigger guard and magazine area.
